summary: Completed testing of Purchase Module Batch Number features. All 4 test cases passed: 1) Batch validation shows error toast when empty, 2) Purchase creation with batch number works, 3) Purchase return selection table shows batch, 4) Return Items table shows batch after Apply Selected Returns.

batch_validation: Clicking Confirm Purchase without batch number shows error toast: 'Please enter batch number for {product_name}'
Form submission is prevented when batch number is empty
User stays on /purchases/create page when validation fails
purchase_creation_with_batch: Purchase PUR-2026-0007 created successfully with batch_no: TEST-BATCH-004
Batch number saved correctly in database
Redirects to purchase detail page after successful creation
purchase_return_selection_table: Original purchase dropdown shows confirmed purchases
Selection table displays 'Batch No' column header
Batch number 'TEST-BATCH-004' displayed in blue badge in selection table
Item can be selected for return with checkbox
purchase_return_items_table: Apply Selected Returns button adds items to Return Items table
Batch number 'TEST-BATCH-004' displayed in blue badge in Return Items table
Return Summary shows correct refund amount

critical_code_review_comments: Code at lines 420-423 correctly validates batch_no is required for purchases
Code at line 282 correctly copies batch_no from original purchase items to return items
Code at lines 651-652 correctly displays batch in selection table
Code at lines 854-862 correctly displays batch in items table for both purchase and return types

success_rate.backend: 100% - Purchase creation with batch works correctly
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All batch number UI features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Created purchase PUR-2026-0007 with batch_no: TEST-BATCH-004 for testing return flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase batch number features fully tested and working: 1) Batch validation on Confirm Purchase shows toast error, 2) Purchase creation saves batch_no correctly, 3) Purchase return selection table shows batch in blue badge, 4) Return Items table shows batch after Apply Selected Returns. Test purchase PUR-2026-0007 has batch_no TEST-BATCH-004 and can be used for return testing.
